scripts.kill:5173: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); if($null -ne $p -and $p.Count -gt 0){Stop-Process -Id $p -Force}"
scripts.dev: npm run kill:5173 && concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort" "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json -w" "tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json -w" "npm run rebuild:native && wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 dist/main/main.cjs dist/preload/preload.cjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --noEmit
